generated_exposure.exposure_text: New report shows that reducing our alliance commitments could leave us dangerously exposed. While some argue for pulling back, experts warn this would actually increase risks to our security. We've worked too hard to build these partnerships - now isn't the time to abandon them. #NationalSecurity #AllianceStrong
